{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/6278228?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jackyliao123/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jackyliao123/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jackyliao123/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jackyliao123/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/jackyliao123", "id": 6278228, "login": "jackyliao123", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjYyNzgyMjg=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jackyliao123/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jackyliao123/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jackyliao123/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jackyliao123/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jackyliao123/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/jackyliao123", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46358", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:P/PR:H/UI:P/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-532", "name": "Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File"}], "description": "### Impact

OpenBao's inline auth functionality incorrectly redacted audit log entries, resulting in non-auth headers being removed and auth-related headers being retained in cleartext. This requires an attacker to compromise access to the audit device. Operators should review leaked source authentication material and rotate it as appropriate.

### Patches

This is fixed in OpenBao v2.5.4.

### Resources

title: OpenBao's Inline Auth Incorrectly Redacted Headers
